'''Gwann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Delrakkin (species)/Legends|Delrakkin]] warrior who aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the ''faux'' Rebel attack on [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]]. Led by [[Untrilla]], he welcomed a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] from the Alliance after some convincing by Untrilla.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]'' {{1st}}
